channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pakistan Launches Airstrikes on Afghan Territories Amid Rising Tensions with Taliban
item.description: Pakistan has announced an escalation of military operations against Afghanistan's Taliban-led government, labelling it an 'open war'. The announcement follows cross-border attacks allegedly carried ou...

item.title: Spotify Introduces Weekly Audiobook Charts for U.S. and U.K. Users
item.description: Spotify has announced the launch of Audiobook Charts for users in the U.S. and U.K., expanding its focus beyond music and podcasts. Similar to its existing charts for other content, the Audiobook Char...

item.title: Labour suffers significant loss in Gorton and Denton by-election, Harman urges stability
item.description: Labour has experienced a significant setback in the Gorton and Denton by-election, with the Green Party candidate, Hannah Spencer, securing victory with 14,980 votes and a majority of 4,402. This mark...

item.title: Hillary Clinton Testifies on Epstein, Denies Knowledge, Criticizes Committee's Questions
item.description: Former US Secretary of State Hillary Clinton appeared before the US House Oversight Committee in New York to answer questions related to disgraced financier Jeffrey Epstein. During the deposition, Cli...

item.title: Rush Reunites for R50 Tour Driven by Lifelong Friendship
item.description: After the death of drummer Neil Peart in 2020, many assumed Canadian progressive rock icons Rush would never reunite. However, Geddy Lee and Alex Lifeson, friends since junior high, have decided to re...

item.title: Rapid Retreat of Hektoria Glacier in Antarctica Highlights Risks of Sudden Ice Loss
item.description: In a remarkable event, Hektoria Glacier on Antarctica's Eastern Peninsula retreated approximately eight kilometers in just two months, with nearly half of the glacier collapsing during this period. Le...

item.title: Potential Risks and Contingency Plans for the International Space Station
item.description: The International Space Station (ISS) constantly faces the threat of space debris, which includes spent rocket parts, broken satellites, and micrometeoroids traveling at extremely high speeds. While m...

item.title: Teenager Detained for Stabbing 14-Year-Old Boy in Manchester
item.description: A 14-year-old boy has been detained for at least 11 years and 10 months after fatally stabbing 14-year-old Ibrahima Seck in Manchester on June 8. Ibrahima was on his way to play football with friends ...

item.title: Greens secure historic Gorton and Denton by-election win, Labour falls to third place
item.description: In a historic result, the Green Party has won its first ever by-election in the UK, capturing the Gorton and Denton seat in Greater Manchester. Hannah Spencer, a 34-year-old plumber and trainee plaste...

item.title: Israeli Soldiers Blocked Medical Aid as Palestinian Teen Died in West Bank
item.description: In November, 14-year-old Palestinian boy Jad Jadallah was shot at close range by Israeli soldiers in the al-Far'a refugee camp in the occupied West Bank. CCTV and eyewitness footage reveal that after ...

item.title: Astronaut Mike Fincke Undergoes Medical Evacuation from International Space Station
item.description: NASA has provided details about a medical situation aboard the International Space Station (ISS) that led to the first-ever medical evacuation in the station's 25-year history. On January 7, astronaut...

item.title: Bill Gates Addresses and Apologizes for Jeffrey Epstein Connections in Gates Foundation Staff Meeting
item.description: Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates addressed his past association with convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein during a routine town hall meeting with staff of the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation. Accordi...

item.title: UK’s oldest male gorilla dies following relocation to new Bristol Zoo enclosure
item.description: Jock, the oldest male gorilla in the United Kingdom, has died at the age of 42, only days after being relocated to a new enclosure at Bristol Zoo Project. Jock had lived for most of his life at the zo...

item.title: Christian organisations criticise Church House for hosting Reform UK press conference
item.description: Several Christian organisations have expressed strong criticism after Reform UK held a press conference at Church House in Westminster, a venue closely associated with the Church of England. The event...

item.title: Two men charged with murder of Sydney grandfather in mistaken identity kidnapping
item.description: Two men in their 20s have been charged with the kidnapping and murder of 85-year-old Sydney grandfather Chris Baghsarian. Authorities believe Baghsarian was taken from his North Ryde home on February ...

item.title: Gregg Wallace withdraws High Court claim against BBC following misconduct investigation
item.description: Former MasterChef presenter Gregg Wallace has withdrawn his legal claim against the BBC and its subsidiary, BBC Studios Distribution Limited, without receiving any damages. Wallace had initially sough...

item.title: Kate Moss, Demi Moore and Emily Ratajkowski lead the runway at Gucci during Milan Fashion Week
item.description: Kate Moss, Demi Moore and Emily Ratajkowski were among the high-profile names attending and modelling at Gucci’s latest show during Milan Fashion Week. Kate, 52, drew particular attention as she walke...

item.title: Man Fined for Public Intoxication After Court Warning in Limerick
item.description: Keith McCarthy, 37, from Mount Richmond Close, Rhebogue, appeared in Limerick District City Court on charges related to a public order offense that occurred on December 14, 2025. Gardaí were called to...

item.title: Daniel Dubois Reunites with Don Charles Ahead of WBO Title Fight Against Fabio Wardley
item.description: Daniel Dubois has reunited with trainer Don Charles following a brief split after his second defeat to Oleksandr Usyk in July at Wembley Stadium. The split had come as a surprise, given that Charles h...

item.title: Pope Leo XIV Announces First Pastoral Visit to Four African Countries
item.description: Pope Leo XIV will embark on a 10-day pastoral visit to Africa starting on 13 April, visiting Algeria, Cameroon, Angola, and Equatorial Guinea. This marks his first pastoral journey to the continent as...
